# Harsh V Singh

> Personal site of Harsh V Singh, Associate Director of Project Delivery at Rang Digitech LLC and a former news reporter for The Times of India, NewsX, International Business Times (Singapore Edition), and British Herald. The site covers his career, credentials, testimonials, published bylines, writing, and a photo journal of encounters from nine years of reporting.

## About

- Associate Director, Project Delivery at Rang Digitech LLC since April 2026, leading delivery for digital marketing accounts across the US, UK, Canada, UAE, and India
- Based in Vadodara, Gujarat, India; also works from Rang's Ahmedabad office
- Former reporter: The Times of India (Hyderabad, civic affairs and public health), NewsX Bangalore bureau (Karnataka state politics), International Business Times Singapore Edition (Hollywood beat), contributor to British Herald
- Education: MA in Journalism and AVC (COMMITS Bangalore), BA in Journalism (Presidency College Bangalore, Promising Journalist Award 2018), B.Com (Garden City College)
- 125+ professional certifications across digital marketing, SEO, generative AI, leadership, and brand strategy (LinkedIn Learning, Semrush, HubSpot, Google, Reuters, Great Learning)
- Has interviewed sitting and former Chief Ministers, a former Prime Minister, Supreme Court justices, Members of Parliament, authors, actors, cricketers, and Nobel laureate Kailash Satyarthi
- Professional philosophy: get the facts right, then make people care

## Site

- [Home](https://harshvsingh.in/): single-page profile with About, services, career timeline, credentials, testimonials, writing, press bylines, photo journal, FAQ, and contact

## Writing

- [Substack](https://singhharsh7.substack.com/): long-form journalism and personal narrative
- [Medium](https://medium.com/@singhharsh_7): essays on geopolitics, policy, and brand strategy

## Press bylines

- [Dirt, dump and filth: Ailing state-run hospitals need booster dose, The Times of India](https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/hyderabad/dirt-dump-filth-ailing-state-run-hospitals-need-booster-dose/articleshow/70849241.cms)
- [On Necklace Road, bikers run over safety, The Times of India](https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/hyderabad/on-necklace-rd-bikers-run-over-safety/articleshow/70268116.cms)
- [Notebooks with KCR's photo draw activists' ire, The Times of India](https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/hyderabad/notebooks-with-kcrs-photo-draws-activists-ire/articleshow/70882866.cms)
- [Reporter archive, International Business Times Singapore](https://www.ibtimes.sg/reporters/harsh-v-singh)
